description: description
responsibilities: About the Expertise Centre – R&D Technologist The R&D Technologist Expertise Centre within ZS’s Drug Development practice partners with biopharma organizations to design and deliver innovative clinical data solutions that accelerate drug development and reduce risk from portfolio to patient. The team operates at the intersection of key ZS drug development verticals—including asset strategy, clinical trial design, clinical data management, statistical programming, regulatory, and risk-based quality. By combining deep clinical domain expertise, data standards, clinical programming, systems understanding, and consulting discipline, the team solves complex R&D challenges with speed, scale, and measurable impact. Director Expertise Center R&D Technologist – Clinical data solutions The Director – R&D Technologist (Clinical Data Solutions) provides strategic and scientific leadership across clinical data management, analytics, biostatistics, statistical programming, and clinical data standards. This role is central to the R&D Technologist Expertise Centre and focuses on designing and delivering innovative clinical data solutions across the drug development lifecycle—with a strong emphasis on clinical data standards, transformation, and analytics-driven decision-making. You will combine deep technical expertise, consulting leadership, and practice-building capabilities to serve as a trusted advisor to senior stakeholders, driving next-generation clinical data and analytics solutions that improve development outcomes and accelerate regulatory submissions What You’ll Do: Strategic & Client Leadership Provide strategic leadership across clinical data management, biometrics, and advanced analytics for end-to-end drug development programs Serve as ZS’s go-to leader for clinical data solutions, bringing a strong techno-functional perspective across clinical data flow and systems Lead complex client engagements spanning clinical data strategy, analytics enablement, and digital R&D transformation Facilitate senior-level workshops to align stakeholders on study design, data standards, analytics approaches, and operating models Clinical Data & Standards Leadership Bring deep expertise in clinical data standards (e.g., CDISC – CDASH, SDTM, ADaM, TLF) Define innovative approaches to clinical data collection, transformation, and analytics Integrate clinical programming, analytics, and data science into trial design, execution, and regulatory workflows Drive adoption of standardized, scalable, and future-ready clinical data models Technology & Innovation Apply a techno-functional lens across clinical systems, data platforms, and enterprise architectures Leverage AI/ML and GenAI approaches to transform clinical data processing and analytics Define future-state operating models and digital ecosystems for clinical data and analytics Delivery Excellence & Governance Oversee quality, scientific rigor, and compliance of deliverables, including analytics, data models, and regulatory outputs Ensure alignment with GxP standards, regulatory expectations, and industry best practices Act as a bridge between scientific, business, and engineering teams Team & Practice Building Lead and grow a high-performing clinical data and analytics team Mentor senior talent and establish standards for delivery excellence Contribute to capability building, accelerators, and new offerings within the Expertise Centre Support business development through solutioning, client pursuits, and long-term relationship building
qualifications: What you’ll bring: Experience & Domain Expertise 18+ years of experience in Life Sciences R&D, with strong expertise in clinical data management, biometrics, and analytics Deep understanding of the end-to-end drug development lifecycle Strong domain knowledge of clinical data, analytics, and digital R&D transformation Clinical Systems & Platforms Experience working with: EDC Platforms: Medidata Rave, Veeva EDC, Oracle InForm Clinical Systems: ePRO, laboratory systems, CTMS, eTMF, CDMS Clinical Data Repositories: SAS LSAF, Oracle LSH, eClinical Elluminate Metadata Repositories: Nurocor, Sycamore, Formedix Statistical Computing: SAS, SAS Viya, Domino Data Standards & Interoperability Strong expertise in: CDISC: CDASH, SDTM, ADaM, TLF Interoperability: FHIR, HL7, USDM Technical & Analytical Skills Working knowledge of R, Python, and SAS for clinical data transformation and analysis Exposure to AI/ML and GenAI-based solutions in clinical data and analytics Strong capability in business process modeling, data flow modeling, and solution architecture design Leadership & Consulting Skills Strong communication and stakeholder management skills with ability to influence senior leaders Proven experience in GxP-compliant, large-scale enterprise programs Ability to lead global, cross-functional, and multi-vendor teams Strong leadership, mentoring, and team-building capabilities Solid understanding of agile, product-led, and digital transformation delivery models

description: description
responsibilities: What You’ll Do: Develop complex solutions for clients using programming languages, ETL service platforms, cloud technologies, and other relevant tools. Take complete ownership of activities and responsibilities across all phases of the project lifecycle, effectively addressing business problems across multiple client engagements. Collaborate with team members to leverage expertise and facilitate seamless transitions throughout the project lifecycle. Exhibit flexibility in addressing new and challenging problems, demonstrating strong task management skills. Assist in creating project deliverables such as business case development, solution vision and design, user requirements, prototypes, technical architecture (if needed), test cases, and operations management. Maintain transparency in driving assigned tasks to completion, providing accurate status reports to stakeholders. Adopt a consulting mindset in problem-solving and innovation, leveraging technical and business knowledge/expertise while collaborating across teams. Support senior team members and delivery leads in project management responsibilities to ensure effective project execution. What You’ll Bring: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, demonstrating a strong academic performance. 3-6 years of relevant consulting experience in small to medium-scale technology solution delivery engagements, with proven success in analytics projects that drive business insights. Hands-on experience with ETL technologies such as Hadoop, Spark, PySpark, Informatica, Talend, SSIS, or similar tools. Proficiency in data warehousing and SQL for effective data management and analysis. Familiarity with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP) is a plus. Demonstrated experience in applying analytics techniques to inform decision-making and optimize project outcomes. Exceptional verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to clearly articulate results and issues to both internal and client teams. Proven capability to think creatively and analytically in a problem-solving environment, delivering effective solutions to complex challenges. Ability to collaborate effectively within a virtual global team environment, contributing to the timely delivery of multiple projects. Willingness to travel to other global offices as needed to work with clients or internal project teams. Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collabrative spirit and probelm-solving approac

description: description
responsibilities: What you'll do: Senior Associate - ITAM in the Enterprise will be responsible for providing supports to all global users on their software needs. Primarily handles software asset management activities like creating, updating, tracking, monitoring, and maintaining software licenses in software management database, as well as monitoring application usage, and reporting compliance of software usage. IT Program associate works with different vendor to get the quote, review them internally and post approval process them for procurement. Working on opportunities to target unused or restricted software for re-harvest/redeployment. Person is responsible for tracking, Maintaining, and auditing the software records on periodic basis. Review new software requests for accuracy and adherence to standards and policies Responsible for collecting the information from end users and coordinating with additional support team to review the software needs. Initial assessment, research, and resolution of basic incidents and requests regarding use of software and components. Work with requestors on alternative options, and ensure the necessary data is captured for compliance, procurement. Escalate compliance matters, standards or policy deviations, and other software related issues to internal escalation teams Compile and maintain inventory of company software and systems assets for the purpose of tracking their corresponding licenses. Administer license change management and license closure. Utilization of the Inventory Tools/ Central repository for optimized use of software licenses / re-harvest or redeployment Ensures the end-to-end user experience and acts as a single point-of-contact for the end user. Periodic review of SaaS / critical tools to ensure that they are compliant with terms of usages Assignation of licenses or removal for various tools. Supporting various IT functions for operational support. Prepare of various reporting ranging from software status to financial spends Responds to requests from managers, and team members, for specific Programs Other duties as assigned.
qualifications: What you’ll bring: Possess Bachelor’s degree in information technology, computer science, or business administration, or in another related field 2 to 4 years of experience in software asset management Ability to translate licensing terms and conditions in License agreements Strong knowledge of contract, licensing, and data privacy regulations/laws and best practices Strong communication, interpersonal, team oriented, organizational, and service mindset. Proactively identify cost savings opportunities relating to software and software maintenance Strong end user service skills Self-motivated, goal oriented, and an innovative thinker Ability to work both independently and in a team-oriented, collaborative environment. Familiar with Microsoft O365 tools Able to prepare the reports in tools like excel. Must be able to handle multiple tasks and ensure proper follow up is maintained SAM certified professional will be a value add. Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approach

fluency in English is required Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collabrative spirit and probelm-solving approac

description: description
responsibilities: ZS’s Digital and Technology group focuses on driving end to end Digital Transformation that includes Digital Strategy, Human centered Design, exploiting emerging technologies, and purposeful change management to improve customer and company results. The types of solutions include Digital Strategy and Advisory services, end to end Transformation Management, Enterprise Data, Analytics and AI, Intelligent Automation, reimagining business processes with digital first lens and building Digital Products, Solutions and Digital Platforms leveraging Big Data Technologies, AI/ML and Advance Analytics, Digital Platform configuration and integrations. We provide a complete spectrum of technology solutions, from strategy and roadmap definition to full scale implementation and on-going operations. Our team possesses deep expertise in leading digital transformation, enterprise data analytic and AI, Data science and advanced analytics and building end to end digital. Manager- Enterprise Architect in Tech and Cloud Advisory ZS's Technology Advisory Group ensures our future information, technology and architectural landscape is built to plan and evolve as our business grows, striving to balance future-proofing our end-to-end technology stack while accelerating the speed of innovation and streamlining the delivery of business capability. This role will be responsible for supporting the growth and development of our Technology Advisory Practice within the ZS Technology Services business.   The successful candidate will work closely with ZS practice leadership and be responsible for evolving our practice, enriching our practice assets and collaterals, building, and managing client relationships, generating new business engagements, and providing thought leadership in the Technology and Architecture Area. What You’ll Do Design robust and scalable solutions consistent with ZS and industry practices; take advantage of the existing assets and maintaining a balance between architecture requirements and specific client needs Drive technical architecture and design discussions with internal and client groups to brainstorm and finalize technology solutions Collaborate with the Architecture & Engineering expertise centre leadership to define technology roadmap and work with delivery team to put together a plan for technical implementation with and stay on track Stay current on latest technology trends and architecture patterns, and lead the effort to develop ZS POV for strategic decision-making Engage with clients to understand their needs and provide tailored solutions. Advance ZS’ technology offerings by innovating and scaling tech assets, driving feasibility analysis to select technologies/platforms that provide the best solution Define and establish a technical strategy, standards, and guidelines in the data architecture domain Groom junior team members and maintain a culture of rapid learning and explorations to drive innovations / POCs on emerging technologies and architecture patterns Participate and support the business development activities. What You’ll Bring Bachelor's degree with specialization in Computer Science, IT or other computer related disciplines 8+ years of relevant experience in designing semantic architecture at an enterprise-scale. Strong engineering mindset to build highly available and robust architecture frameworks, technology solutions and reusable assets Expertise in one or more of initiatives like cloud strategy, IT transformation, and application portfolio assessment. Excellent communication and client engagement skills and ability to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment. Experience in providing architecture alternatives, product evaluation and recommendations, POVs for implementation/adoption. Experience in scaling technology solutions aimed at solving complex business problems. Knowledge of all phases of solution development for large-scale solutions and experience working in agile teams with short release cycles. Strong technical team leadership, mentorship and collaboration abilities. Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approac

description: description
responsibilities: As a Delivery Excellence Specialist at ZS Associates, you will be responsible for driving delivery excellence by ensuring that delivery processes are executed with precision, consistency, and alignment to organizational standards. You will provide strategic and technical guidance to delivery teams, enabling them to implement and sustain high-performing controls and practices that support delivery efficiency and continuous improvement. By collaborating with key stakeholders—including Delivery Managers and Leaders - you will help deliver a comprehensive view of delivery health, performance metrics, and their impact on business outcomes. Your advanced knowledge of delivery management principles and project execution will empower you to lead innovative initiatives, optimize delivery frameworks, and manage a diverse team in a dynamic and evolving technology landscape. What You'll Do: Work closely with delivery teams to embed best practices in delivery excellence, risk management, ensuring successful outcomes for aligned programs Track and report operational KPIs to support data-driven decision-making. Monitor delivery performance metrics and escalate issues to ensure timely resolution Collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive continuous improvement in delivery practices. Conduct process reviews and identify inefficiencies, recommending actionable improvements. Assist in designing and implementing process improvement initiatives using Lean, Six Sigma, or Agile methodologies. Identify operational bottlenecks and support initiatives to enhance efficiency and effectiveness. Participate in change management initiatives by supporting communication, training, and stakeholder engagement activities. Help assess the impact of changes and gather feedback to refine implementation strategies. Promote adoption of new tools, processes, and systems across teams. Perform periodic project audits / reviews for the project delivery process based on CMMI (Capability Maturity Model Integration) process areas and report non compliances, best practices followed Assist in Delivery Risk governance and work closely with QRM Leads ensuring effective risk management and mitigation throughout lifecycle of projects Conduct trainings on Delivery Excellence focus areas, QMS process assets and awareness on best practices Maintain and ensure project process maturity (CMMI Level 3) adherence for ensuring Capability Maturity Model Integration (CMMI) v3.0 Development & Services appraisal and accreditation process Showcase expertise on Software Quality Management framework such as ISO9001, CMMI Development, CMMI Services and focus on performance and continuous improvement at project as well as organization level Enhance Delivery and Operations maturity through close engagement and planned intervention across all project phases Definition and regular enhancement of enterprise level Quality Management System aka Enterprise Delivery Framework (EDF) supporting Development (Waterfall, Agile) as well as Operations projects (Services delivery methodology. What You'll Bring: Bachelor's degree in IT or relevant field with a strong academic record. A minimum of 7-10 years of experience in Delivery Excellence and Quality Management Strong communication & strategic influencing skills. Relevant experience working with senior leaders, building internal networks, and delivering high impact programs in complex -matrixed environments. Formal training or certification in Delivery/Operations excellence, and/or 5+ years of experience or equivalent expertise in technology Delivery excellence management, Operations excellence, Software Quality Management & Software Quality Standards or related field. Familiarity with delivery excellence frameworks, industry standards, and pharma regulatory requirements (HIPPA, GXP etc) Proficient knowledge and expertise in data security, risk assessment & reporting, control evaluation, design, and governance, with a proven record of implementing effective risk mitigation strategies. Proficient in MS Office productivity suite (e.g., Word, Excel, PowerPoint, SharePoint). Advanced Excel skills strongly preferred Six Sigma Black Belt/ITIL/CMMI/ISO9001 Lead auditor/MBA or relevant Delivery excellence / Audit certification Experience with Project management tools (e.g., Atlassian JIRA, Confluence, MS Project) and Quality Assurance tools CMMI implementation experience (Maturity level 3 at minimum/ High maturity implementation experience preferred ) Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, for reporting and interacting with stakeholders. Ability to work independently and as part of a team Willingness to adapt to evolving industry standards and technologies Ability to manage a wide variety of tasks and meet deadlines, and reliability/dependability Proven ability to work creatively and analytically in a problem-solving environment Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approach How you’ll grow: Cross-functional skills development & custom learning pathways Milestone training programs aligned to career progression opportunities Internal mobility paths that empower growth via s-curves, individual contribution and role expansions Hybrid working model: ZS is committed to a Flexible and Connected way of working. ZSers are onsite at clients or ZS offices three days a week. Combined flexibility to work remotely two days a week is also available. The magic of ZS culture and innovation thrives in both planned and spontaneous face-to-face connections

role: Lead R&D Technologist - Clinical Business Analyst (Clinical Data Solutions)
description: description
responsibilities: About ZS R&D (Life Sciences) ZS life science R&D team partners with clients to discover and develop innovative medicines that improve patient's lives. Our work spans consulting, analytics and technology (services and platforms) projects across the several domains. We have 3500+ zs professionals that deliver R&D programs, $100MM+ invested in R&D data, analytics and technology assets and 100+ clients on R&D programs. About the Expertise Centre – R&D Technologist The R&D Technologist Expertise Centre within ZS’s Drug Development practice partners with biopharma organizations to design and deliver innovative clinical data solutions that accelerate drug development and reduce risk from portfolio to patient. The team operates at the intersection of key ZS drug development verticals—including asset strategy, clinical trial design, clinical data management, statistical programming, regulatory, and risk-based quality. By combining deep clinical domain expertise, data standards, clinical programming, systems understanding, and consulting discipline, the team solves complex R&D challenges with speed, scale, and measurable impact. What You’ll Do: Business Analysis Leadership & Agile Delivery Lead BA activities within Agile teams (Scrum / SAFe / Kanban) and act as the primary requirements owner for assigned workstreams. Drive discovery: plan and facilitate workshops, stakeholder interviews, and requirement walkthroughs with clinical, biometrics, data management, and technology teams. Convert complex clinical and business needs into clear deliverables (epics, features, user stories, acceptance criteria) with strong testability and traceability (RTM). Partner with Product Owners to shape the backlog (prioritization, refinement, scope management) and support sprint ceremonies (planning, reviews, retrospectives). Identify risks, dependencies, and gaps early; propose options and recommendations, and support timely decision-making. Mentor Associate Consultants / BAs on best practices for story writing, requirement quality, and stakeholder management. Clinical Data Hub & Repository Programs Lead requirements and solution definition for clinical data hubs/repositories, including source onboarding (EDC, Labs, eCOA, Imaging, Safety) and downstream consumption. Define data ingestion, mapping, transformation, reconciliation, and access-control requirements; ensure alignment with data governance expectations. Collaborate with architects/engineering to validate data flows, metadata strategy, and quality controls in GxP-compliant environments. Support UAT strategy, test scenario design, defect triage, and release readiness for repository/platform deployments. Clinical Data Products & AI-Driven Automation Own functional requirements for clinical data products and automation initiatives (e.g., SDTM/ADaM enablement, mapping accelerators, automated checks, reusable analytics components). Translate clinical/biometrics needs into automation use cases, ensure measurable acceptance criteria, and align stakeholders on expected outcomes. Work with data science/engineering teams to define training/validation datasets, quality thresholds, and operational workflows (human-in-the-loop, auditability). Statistical & risk based clinical data review Lead requirement definition for centralized/statistical monitoring solutions, including metrics, signals, dashboards, reports, and operational workflows for study oversight. Partner with statisticians, clinical operations, and quality stakeholders to ensure monitoring logic is transparent, testable, and fit for purpose. Stakeholder Collaboration & Delivery Management Serve as the day-to-day BA lead for client and internal stakeholders; manage expectations and ensure clarity of scope, decisions, and documentation. Coordinate with Engineering, AI, CDM, and Product teams to ensure requirements are feasible, complete, and aligned to target architecture. Maintain high-quality project artefacts (BRD/FRD, user stories, process flows, data flows, traceability, release notes) and support audits as needed What You’ll Bring: Experience & Domain Expertise Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Life Sciences, Pharmacy, Statistics, Data Science, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field. 7 – 12 years of experience in Life Sciences R&D Understanding of the end-to-end drug development lifecycle Strong domain knowledge in life sciences in either of the following domain: discovery/pre-clinical, clinical, regulatory Proven experience leading requirements end-to-end in Agile delivery (story mapping, backlog management, sprint execution support). Excellent communication, facilitation, and stakeholder management skills. Clinical Systems & Platforms Good to have Experience working with: EDC Platforms: Medidata Rave, Veeva EDC, Oracle InForm Clinical Systems: ePRO, laboratory systems, CTMS, eTMF, CDMS Clinical Data Repositories: SAS LSAF, Oracle LSH, eClinical Elluminate Metadata Repositories: Nurocor, Sycamore, Formedix Statistical Computing: SAS, SAS Viya, Domino Data Standards & Interoperability Good to have Expertise in: CDISC: CDASH, SDTM, ADaM, TLF Interoperability: FHIR, HL7, USDM Technical & Analytical Skills Good to have: Working knowledge of R, Python, and SASfor clinical data transformation and analysis Exposure to AI/ML and GenAI-based solutionsin clinical data and analytics Strong capability in business process modeling, data flow modeling, and solution architecture desig

description: description
responsibilities: Media and Analyst Relations Associate Consultant Imagine shaping how a global consulting and tech firm is seen across India. Turning stories into headlines, building connections with media, and making our leaders the go-to voices in tech. Join our Marketing & Communications team in Gurugram as we strengthen our position as a global tech partner and employer of choice in the India region. What you'll do: Media and Analyst Relations Associate Consultant in the Enterprise will… Craft and execute media strategies: Plan, organize, and execute a comprehensive media strategy for the India region Create compelling content: Write press releases, thought leadership opinion pieces, media interview briefs, and reactive statements for external and internal use Drive PR campaigns: Partner with external agencies and internal leaders to run high-impact initiatives Build media connections: Forge lasting relationship with media and analyst, handle their queries, and keep our story front and center Measure and optimize impact: Track and report on the effectiveness of media and analyst relations strategies, using metrics and KPIs to assess impact and alignment with strategic goals Stay ahead of the curve: Monitor competitor’s news and spot opportunities to outpace them Prepare for anything: Develop crisis management plan in case of any negative fallout affecting the firm's image Industry awards: Lead awards submissions and amplify wins to elevate ZS across India What you'll bring: Minimum bachelor’s degree in communication, journalism or related field; master’s degree (MA/MS/MBA) preferred 6+ years in media relations at a multinational firm, with hands-on wins in PR campaigns Excellent writing, editing and verbal communications skills Demonstrated ability to manage internal client relationships, including senior leaders Proven record in managing public relations programs that achieve results Ability to lead multiple projects simultaneously with strong prioritization skills Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and a passion for delivering top-quality work Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approac

description: description
responsibilities: About Advanced Data Science (ADS): ZS’s Advanced Data Science group is focused on creating practical impact for clients across various industries such as Healthcare and Bio-Tech, Hi-Tech & Telecommunication, Financial Services and Travel through advanced analytics and emerging data sources. Emerging datasets include both unstructured datasets (for example, text, voice, image, etc.) and semi-structured datasets (for example, patientlevel records). Advanced analytical techniques span a range of innovative machine learning, artificial intelligence, advanced statistics and optimization approaches. Being part of the ADS group at ZS will be an opportunity for you to work on cutting-edge solutions, utilizing new age data sources to shape innovations across multiple areas, for our clients and the broader ZS community. A key enabler of our services is leveraging data in delivering client solutions. The data available about customers is getting richer and the problems that our customers are trying to answer continue to evolve. In our endeavor to stay ahead in providing solutions to these evolving complex problems, ZS has set up an Advanced Data Science which has three major focus areas: Research the evolving datasets and advanced analytical techniques to develop new offerings/solutions Deliver client impact by collaboratively implementing these solutions Provide thought leadership by developing the ZS Point of View in this space Data Science Managers (DSMs) design, develop and execute analytic techniques on large, complex, structured and unstructured data sets (including big data) to help clients make better fact-based decisions. DSMs will develop new offerings/solutions, drive client impact by delivering client solutions and shape the ZS point of view in this space. You will be responsible for applying analytical techniques to model complex business problems, uncovering insights, and identifying opportunities using statistical, algorithmic, mining, and visualization techniques. What You’ll Do: Lead and mentor a team of data scientists, providing guidance and support to ensure the successful execution of client projects. Develop and implement data science strategies that align with the overall goals of the AI team and the organization. Drive business and strategy development through project delivery and client relationship management; Develop/sell new business opportunities Direct multiple projects simultaneously, honing analytic and project management skills; Play a key role in development of data science capabilities and offerings that create scale and advance our analytic platform; Motivate, coach and serve as a role model for project team members Provide thought leadership and innovation through research and publication. What You’ll Bring: PhD degree in Computer Science, Statistics or related discipline; 8+ years of relevant post-collegiate work experience; in lieu of a PhD, 10+ years of work experience may substitute. Experience with big data, claims analytics, advanced analytics concepts and algorithms (e.g. text mining, social listening, recommender systems, predictive modeling, Gen AI, proficiency with large language models etc.); Relevant programming background (e.g. Python/R); Strong understanding of relevant tools/platforms (e.g. cloud platforms such AWS/Azure); Proven track record of business development Agile project planning and project management experience; Team management and skill development experience; Relevant domain knowledge preferred; (healthcare, pharma); Excellent oral and written communication skills; Strong attention to detail, with a research-focused mindset; Excellent critical thinking and problem solving skills
